ValidationMessageSnippets: ReviewNotes la bat buoc khi bulk reject suggestions.
Da vuot qua gioi han test case

properties: filterBySuggestionType: string? optional enum = BoundaryNegative | HappyPath | Security | Performance
filterByTestType: string? optional enum = HappyPath | Boundary | Negative | Performance | Security
reviewNotes: string? optional max length 4000 but required when action = Reject
notes: Khong co suggestionIds[] trong contract hien tai.
action parse case-insensitive nhung khong co trim whitespace rieng; FE nen gui exact enum value.
reviewNotes la mot gia tri dung chung cho ca batch.
Neu gui dong thoi nhieu filter, server ket hop theo logic AND.
Request khong co rowVersion.
matchedCount va processedCount giong nhau trong current all-or-nothing flow.
suggestionIds theo thu tu DisplayOrder asc cua batch duoc server chon.
appliedTestCaseIds rong khi action = Reject hoac khi matchedCount = 0.
reviewedAt la server UTC timestamp; zero-match path van co field nay.
reasonCode hien co tren ConflictException va mot so conflict infrastructure.
Non-owner access hien map thanh 400 ProblemDetails thay vi 403.

dependentReadSurface.name: RefreshLlmSuggestionListAfterBulkReview
notes: Dung endpoint FE-15 nay de refetch danh sach sau khi bulk approve/reject.
List route hydrate them currentUserFeedback va feedbackSummary theo FE-16.

dependentReadSurface.name: RefreshSingleLlmSuggestionAfterBulkReview
notes: Dung khi UI can rowVersion, appliedTestCaseId, hoac feedback metadata moi nhat cho 1 item cu the.

endpoints.name: BulkReviewLlmSuggestions
problemCases: 400 ValidationProblemDetails khi body malformed JSON, missing action, action vuot max length 20, filterBySuggestionType/filterByTestType vuot max length 50, reviewNotes vuot max length 4000, hoac filterByEndpointId khong bind duoc thanh Guid.
400 ProblemDetails cho action khong hop le, reject khong co reviewNotes, filter enum khong hop le, non-owner access, hoac vuot MaxTestCasesPerSuite trong approve path.
409 ProblemDetails voi reasonCode=ORDER_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED khi bulk approve nhung suite chua co approved API order.
409 ProblemDetails voi reasonCode=CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT khi co concurrent update trong qua trinh ghi batch.
notes: Matched set luon duoc server tinh lai tu durable suggestion rows, khong tu selected ids tren client.
Selection query luon filter them ReviewStatus = Pending va sort DisplayOrder asc.
Suggestions khong Pending se bi bo qua vi khong nam trong target set.
Khong co partial-success response hien tai: hoac 0-match no-op, hoac full success cho matched set.
Approve path materialize thanh TestCase graph, tao change logs, tao 1 TestSuiteVersion, va increment suite.Version 1 lan.
Reject path chi update metadata tren suggestion rows va khong tao TestCase/TestSuiteVersion moi.
Response chi la batch summary; FE nen refetch GET list/detail neu can suggestion state moi nhat.

runtimeRules: Current generate path cua FE-15 van tao SuggestionType = BoundaryNegative, nen nhieu filter suggestionType hop le ve contract co the se tra 0 o runtime hien tai.
Bulk approve reuse ILlmSuggestionReviewService cung materialization path voi FE-15 single review.
Bulk reject reuse cung review service nhung chi ghi ReviewStatus, ReviewedById, ReviewedAt, ReviewNotes, UpdatedDateTime, va RowVersion tren tung suggestion.
Bulk approve check MaxTestCasesPerSuite cho tong so suggestion match batch truoc transaction, va increment usage 1 lan sau khi thanh cong.
Bulk approve van phu thuoc vao approved API order gate cua FE-05A/FE-15.
TestCase.OrderIndex moi duoc append sau max OrderIndex hien co trong suite.
1 batch approve tao 1 TestSuiteVersion moi, khong tao moi version cho tung suggestion.
reviewNotes trong approve path la optional va neu co se duoc copy vao tung suggestion duoc approve.
Bulk endpoint khong tra lai rowVersion moi cua tung suggestion; muon lay rowVersion moi phai refetch GET.
Bulk endpoint khong hydrate currentUserFeedback va feedbackSummary vi response khong phai LlmSuggestionModel.
No explicit archived-suite guard exists in current bulk handler/service.
No pagination, no search, no sort override, va khong co contract explicit ids[] tren bulk endpoint.

approveByEndpointRequest.reviewNotes: Bulk approve cac scenario negative da duoc review tren list.

rejectByEndpointRequest.reviewNotes: Endpoint nay hien tai chua can cover bo suggestion preview nay.

rejectWithoutNotes400.detail: ReviewNotes la bat buoc khi bulk reject suggestions.
rejectWithoutNotes400.message: ReviewNotes la bat buoc khi bulk reject suggestions.

limitExceeded400.title: Bad Request
limitExceeded400.detail: Da vuot qua gioi han test case cho goi subscription. Limit exceeded
limitExceeded400.message: Da vuot qua gioi han test case cho goi subscription. Limit exceeded

validationProblem400MissingAction.title: One or more validation errors occurred.

orderConfirmationRequired409.title: Conflict
orderConfirmationRequired409.detail: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan. Vui long review/approve thu tu API truoc khi tao test cases.
orderConfirmationRequired409.message: Chua co API order duoc xac nhan. Vui long review/approve thu tu API truoc khi tao test cases.

concurrency409.title: Conflict
concurrency409.detail: Suggestion da duoc thay doi boi thao tac khac. Vui long tai lai va thu lai.
concurrency409.message: Suggestion da duoc thay doi boi thao tac khac. Vui long tai lai va thu lai.

relatedNotes: Sau 200, FE nen refetch GET /llm-suggestions neu UI can reviewStatus, rowVersion, appliedTestCaseId, currentUserFeedback, hoac feedbackSummary moi nhat.
Neu UI hien 'Approve all visible', bo visible filter do phai map duoc 1-1 sang filter body cua API; client-side search/selection khong duoc server hieu.
Neu can arbitrary multi-select ids, contract backend hien tai chua support va FE nen fallback sang single review hoac doi them API moi.
